hero.title: Run your business
hero.subtitle: Finance, marketing, legal, sales, community, engineering. 38 specialized agents ready to work. Open source. One command.

screenshots.sectionTitle: Command center for your AI team
screenshots.sectionSubtitle: See and control every agent, routine, and AI cost in real time.
screenshots.sectionNote: Web dashboard included. No extra setup.

features.sectionSubtitle: EvoNexus comes with a complete suite of tools out of the box.

agents.title: 38 Specialized Agents
agents.desc: 17 business agents (ops, finance, marketing, sales, legal and more) + 21 engineering agents (architecture, code, review, tests, security and more). Each with their own memory and scope.

skills.title: 175+ Skills
skills.desc: Business skills (fin-, social-, mkt-, hr-, legal-...) plus 25 dev-* engineering skills (autopilot, plan, ralplan, verify, ultraqa, trace...)

routines.title: Automated Routines
routines.desc: Morning briefing to monthly close, running on schedule automatically

dashboard.title: Web Dashboard
dashboard.desc: React + Flask with auth, roles, terminal, reports, service management

integrations.title: 23 Integrations
integrations.desc: Gmail, Calendar, GitHub, Linear, Discord, Stripe, Bling, Asaas, Omie, and more

channels.title: Channels
channels.desc: Bidirectional chat via Telegram, Discord, and iMessage. Talk to Claude from your phone.

memory.title: Persistent Memory
memory.desc: Two-tier system that remembers context across conversations and sessions

teams.title: Agent Teams
teams.desc: Parallel multi-agent execution for faster consolidation routines (experimental)

scheduled.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduled.desc: One-off actions at a specific date/time. Schedule a skill, prompt, or script.

openSource.title: 100% Open Source
openSource.desc: MIT License, fork it, customize it, own your entire AI infrastructure.

why.sectionTitle: What changes when you have a structured AI team
why.sectionSubtitle: Claude Code is powerful. Without structure, you reconfigure the same agent every week. With EvoNexus, it remembers who you are.

markdownFirst.title: Markdown-First Agents
markdownFirst.desc: Agents are plain .md files with system prompts. No SDK, no plugin runtime, no compile step. Drop a file in .claude/agents/ and it's live.

skillsAsInstructions.title: Skills as Instructions
skillsAsInstructions.desc: 175+ reusable capabilities across finance, community, social, engineering, data, legal, HR, ops, product, CS. Each one a markdown instruction set. Add, edit, or remove by editing text.

multiProvider.title: Multi-Provider, No Lock-In
multiProvider.desc: Default runs on Anthropic's native claude CLI, or swap to OpenRouter, OpenAI, Gemini, Bedrock, or Vertex AI via OpenClaude. One click in the Providers page, no code changes. Your keys, your model choice.

mcpIntegrations.title: MCP Integrations
mcpIntegrations.desc: Model Context Protocol connects agents to Google Calendar, Gmail, GitHub, Linear, Telegram, Canva, Notion, and more. Standardized interface with first-class support built in.

slashCommands.title: Slash Commands
slashCommands.desc: Type /clawdia, /flux, /pulse, or /apex to activate agents instantly. Natural command interface directly in the terminal. No menus, no forms.

persistentMemory.title: Persistent Memory
persistentMemory.desc: Two-tier memory: CLAUDE.md for working state, per-agent memory/ for long-term context. Survives across sessions. Your agents remember who you are, what you're working on, and what's been decided.

howItWorks.sectionTitle: From zero to AI ops in minutes

step2.title: Start Dashboard
step2.desc: Web UI with admin setup, scheduler included

step3.title: Use Your Agents
step3.desc: Your AI team takes over your routines

agents.sectionSubtitle: 38 specialized agents ready to handle your operations and your code. 17 business + 21 engineering.
agents.attribution: 19 engineering agents derived from oh-my-claudecode (MIT, by Yeachan Heo) + 2 native

clawdia.desc: Responds to emails, schedules meetings, delivers your daily briefing before you open the laptop.

flux.desc: Stripe, ERP integration, cash flow reports, and monthly close. No spreadsheet needed.

atlas.desc: GitHub PRs, Linear issues, sprint tracking. One agent for the full project view.

oracle.desc: Onboarding consultant. Interviews your business, maps workspace capabilities, delivers an implementation plan.

pixel.desc: Content calendar, post drafts, analytics reports across YouTube, Instagram, LinkedIn.

pulse.desc: Discord and WhatsApp monitoring, FAQ sync, sentiment analysis. Your community never sleeps.

apex.desc: Architectural design, read-only debugging, tradeoff analysis. Opus-tier reasoning.

bolt.desc: Smallest viable diff implementation. Files changed, tests green, no scope creep.

quickstart.sectionSubtitle: One command. That's all it takes.
quickstart.comment: # Or manually: git clone + make setup + make dashboard-app

banner.text: An Evolution Foundation open source project.

footer.disclaimer: Unofficial toolkit for Claude Code. Not affiliated with Anthropic.
